context: Six test files were untracked in the working tree during Session A commits today, causing the pre-commit Gate 3f to incorrectly scan them (or block adjacent commits). Session B later committed all six. This report documents their final state.

summary.root_cause: Gate 3f in .githooks/pre-commit called check_test_quality.py --pre-commit which internally re-ran `git diff --cached`. When Session A had adjacent structural test files newly staged (or the fallback triggered), the entire working tree including these untracked files was scanned. Fixed: hook now passes the staged file list explicitly as positional args; script no longer auto-scans working tree by default.
